questionHtml:
A mass at the end of a string is moving in a horizontal circle at constant speed. The string makes an angle θ to the vertical.

What is the magnitude of the acceleration of the mass?


A.  g

B.  g sin θ

C.  g cos θ

D.  g tan θ

meta.title: A mass at the end of a string is moving in a horizontal circle at constant speed. The string makes an angle θ to the vertical. What is the magnitude of the acceleration of the mass
